manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are participating in a collaborative guessing game.
The goal is to find out whether this grid and another picture only I can see, are the same.
Please describe your grid first. Then, I will provide my description and we can ask each other questions about the grids to figure out whether they are the same. Now start your short grid description with "DESCRIPTION:" followed by the description. Do not add anything else. This is your grid:
▢ ▢ X ▢ ▢
▢ ▢ X ▢ ▢
▢ X X X ▢
▢ X X X ▢
X X X X X

message.content: .DESCRIPTION: A 5×5 grid. Row 1: empty, empty, filled, empty, empty. Row 2: empty, empty, filled, empty, empty. Row 3: empty, filled, filled, filled, empty. Row 4: empty, filled, filled, filled, empty. Row 5: filled, filled, filled, filled, filled.
message.reasoning: We need to follow instruction: start description with "DESCRIPTION:" then description, no other text. Provide short grid description. So output only description

reasoning_details.text: We need to follow instruction: start description with "DESCRIPTION:" then description, no other text. Provide short grid description. So output only description
